headline: FILIPINO BEAUTY
BUILT WITH
PURPOSE
hero.body: A homegrown Filipino brand — from Isabela to Marikina — creating wellness that works at a price that respects every kababayan.

company.whoBody: We are headquartered in Marikina City and Isabela, selling directly to Filipino consumers through TikTok Shop, Shopee, Lazada, and our own direct channels — a homegrown beauty brand that competes with the best.
company.purposeBody: We unlock innovative potential in Filipino beauty — empowering our workforce, resellers, and communities through products made with purpose, at a price that respects every kababayan.
company.whyBody: Our team across marketing, sales, operations, and product delivers real results for customers, builds livelihoods for our people, and honors every community we serve — with the same consistency behind every batch, every shelf, and every partnership.

mission.storyLead: We started in a barrio in Isabela — built through hard work, faith, and refusing to quit.
mission.story: Today we create Filipino-made beauty and wellness products that work — for customers who deserve more, and for people who believe excellence is not optional. Every formula, every partnership, and every shelf reflects the same standard we held from day one.

vision.title: Our vision
vision.body: To transform 1 million Filipino lives by 2030 — empowering our workforce, resellers, and communities through products made with purpose.

missionStatement.title: Our mission
missionStatement.body: We create Filipino-made beauty and wellness products that work — building livelihoods for our workforce and resellers, delivering real results for our customers, and honoring every community we serve.

mission.valuesTagline: Five principles that shape how we treat people, build products, and show up every day.

values.title: Malasakit first
values.subtitle: How we treat each other
values.description: We treat every kababayan — employee, reseller, customer — like family. Their wins are our wins.

values.title: We rise together
values.subtitle: How we move as one team
values.description: No one climbs alone at K Gold. When one of us wins, we lift the next. When one of us falls, we reach back.

values.title: Ownership
values.subtitle: How we work
values.description: We own the outcome, not just the task. No one at K Gold says 'that's not my job.'

values.title: Excellence with humility
values.subtitle: How we build
values.description: We build products and services worthy of our name — and we stay grateful for the chance to do this work.

values.title: Grit ng Pinoy
values.subtitle: How we endure
values.description: We started in a barrio in Isabela. We built this through hard work, faith, and refusing to quit. That is the standard.

leadership.title: Leadership
leadership.quote: We are ruthless about our standards because we care deeply about our people and our customers. Excellence is not optional here — it is our competitive advantage.
leadership.name: Leanne Domenden

careers.title: Build beauty with purpose.
careers.description: We grow when our people grow. Explore full-time roles and internship programs across marketing, sales, operations, and product.
